scripts.phone: PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH cd companion && npx expo run:ios --device
scripts.phone:sim: PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH cd companion && npx expo start --ios
scripts.phone:start: PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH cd companion && npx expo start
scripts.phone:prebuild: PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH cd companion && npx expo prebuild --clean
scripts.phone:build: PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH cd companion && npx expo prebuild --clean && npx expo run:ios --device
scripts.watch:sim: cd watch && xcodebuild -project Tap.xcodeproj -scheme 'Tap Watch App' -destination 'platform=watchOS Simulator,name=Apple Watch Series 10 (46mm)' -configuration Debug build 2>&1 | tail -5
scripts.relay:status: source .env && sshpass -e ssh -p $VPS_PORT $VPS_USER@$VPS_HOST systemctl status tap-relay
scripts.clean: cd companion && rm -rf node_modules .expo ios && npm install
